summary: [APU Health Monitor] Create query for APU Health Monitor in Engine Folder

output_fields.name: psn
output_fields.description: Unique PSN associated with each APU Serial Number

output_fields.name: ref_date
output_fields.description: Reference Date (latest date only for each APU)

transformations: Join rotables table with rotables_trend table on psn field
Join result with aircraft table on ac_registr field to obtain aircraft type
For each APU (identified by psn), select only the row with the maximum ref_date to get the latest reference date
Retain event_perfno_i value as-is if present, otherwise null
acceptance_criteria: Query returns all APUs fitted to B737NG aircraft with their latest CT5ATP trend data
Each APU appears only once with its most recent reference date
All required fields are populated: APU P/n, APU S/n, PSN, Aircraft Reg., Reference Date, CT5, Workorder, and CT5ATP value
VDS is created in Engine Folder
Query executes successfully against AMOS Acceptance environment
When AMOS production goes live, connection can be switched to production database without query modification
